role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on language (Portuguese) and phone number area codes.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Brazil through a convergence of linguistic (Portuguese), botanical (Restinga), and regulatory (utility poles/trucks) evidence. The reasoning was consistent and well-supported by the image.
